gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the working-tree diff with no blocking findings; it noted the new serving_environment_profile field is derived from the existing pinned profile API and preserves fail-closed factory behavior.
scope: Native probe diagnostics, serving-engine handoff documentation, and focused governance/tests only.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_native_probe_factories.py tests/test_serving_env.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q; poetry run python smoke for builtin_native_probe_factories_to_record; git diff --check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests; poetry run pytest -q
what_changed: Added pinned serving-environment profile metadata to built-in native probe factory diagnostics and documented the operator handoff in the README.
why: Native vLLM/SGLang probe factories intentionally fail closed until block-manager adapters exist, but release operators need diagnostics that tie each reserved probe entry point to the exact isolated engine profile and dependency constraints.
